title: dense canadian potatoes paella
description: a sour, crumbly, romantic dish featuring charlotte potatoes, sashimi-cut, gluten-free-friendly, in a paella pan

ingredients.name: saffron-infused oil
ingredients.notes: made by infusing saffron threads in olive oil

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
add the onion powder and garlic powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the sashimi-cut charlotte potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add the saffron threads and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the lemon juice and white wine vinegar, and stir to combine.
add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
stir in the saffron-infused oil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
serve the paella hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
let the paella rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
